","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/components/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/components/README.md","text":"# components > Reusable UI component framework with composable mixins and facade components Build complex interactive widgets by combining small, focused building blocks. ## Key features * **Facade components** -- ready-to-use `pills` (with inline/popup filtering) and `vtabs` components * **Mixin system** -- composable behaviours: state handling, single/multi select, delegation * **Style-by-type** -- swappable visual styles (e.g., `simple-hoverable-pill`, `tabs-style`) * **Menu component** -- configurable menu with delegate-based actions * **Showcase** -- live interactive examples demonstrating all components ## Prerequisites No external prerequisites. ## Quick start Use facade components directly via transclusion. See the showcase tiddler (`$:/plugins/rimir/components/showcase`) for interactive examples of all available components and mixins. ## Plugin Library Install from the [rimir plugin library](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-plugin-library/) via *Control Panel → Plugins → Get more plugins*. ## Demo Try this plugin in the [live demo wiki](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-demo/). ## License MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md) ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/changelog","created":"20260305110450246","modified":"20260305110450246","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog |!Version |!Date |!Changes | |v0.1.6 |2026-03-27 |Fix doc/reference.tid: correct defaults, function names, CSS classes, slot variables; remove dead code from pills.tid | |v0.1.5 |2026-03-23 |Add `filterable="inline"` mode to pills component (search input above pills instead of popup) | |v0.1.4 |2026-03-15 |Extract inline styles to stylesheet tiddlers, replace hardcoded colors with palette references | |v0.1.3 |2026-03-15 |Add name field to plugin.info | |v0.1.2 |2026-03-15 |Add regression tests and CI test gate | |v0.1.1 |2026-03-06 |Standardize plugin tabs: add documentation/changelog/license to list, replace license.tid with LICENSE.md.meta sidecar | |v0.1.0 |2026 |Initial release | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/menu":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/menu","code-body":"yes","created":"20260205073441930","modified":"20260305110450247","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$slot $name="additional-contents"/> <$eventcatcher selector=".rrc-elem" $click=<> tag="div">

text"},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/utils":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/utils","code-body":"yes","created":"20260205155904789","modified":"20260305110450249","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\widget $tiddler=<> $field=<> $value=<>/> \end"},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/styles/bytype/simple-hoverable-pill":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/styles/bytype/simple-hoverable-pill","code-body":"yes","created":"20260205135524175","modified":"20260305110450249","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\parameters (elem-type, bgcolor:"red", hbgcolor:"blue") span[data-elem-type="<>"] { border-radius: 1em; font-weight:bold; background-color: <>; } span:hover[data-elem-type="<>"] { background-color: <>; }"},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/styles/bytype/tabs-style":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/styles/bytype/tabs-style","code-body":"yes","created":"20260206113338746","modified":"20260305110450249","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\parameters (elem-type, bgcolor:"lightgrey", hbgcolor:"grey", shape) \whitespace trim span[data-elem-type="<>"] { background:<>; <%if [enlistmatch[btlf]]%> border-top-left-radius: 1em; <%endif%> <%if [enlistmatch[lnk]]%> color: blue; <%endif%> border: 1px dotted; font-weight:bold; } span:hover[data-elem-type="<>"] { background-color: <>; }"},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/architecture","created":"20260305110450249","modified":"20260305110450249","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Three-layer mixin system * ''rrc0.* (Core/Model)'' — element list, type mapping, visibility, view dispatch, click dispatch, CSS classes ** `rrc0.elems()` — returns element list ** `rrc0.elem-type(element)` — maps element to type code ** `rrc0.elem-visible(element)` — visibility filter ** `rrc0.elem-view(element)` — rendering dispatch ** `rrc0.elem-clicked(element)` — click handler dispatch ** `rrc0.elem-add-class(element)` — CSS class dispatch * ''rrc1.* (Behavior)'' — state handling, selection, type-specific handlers ** State functions, sync functions, type-specific handlers ** Delegation pattern: check `rrc1.:`, fallback to `rrc1.`, use default !! Facade components |!Facade |!Parameters |!Key slots |!Rendering | |`pills` |elements, selection, filterable, sync-tiddler, sync-field, state, instid |view, on-select |Transcludes `core/menu` | |`vtabs` |elements, type-fn, state, instid, visible-types, default-collapsed, lnk-navigate |view-sec, view-act, view-pop, view-lnk, view-sco, view-spa, view (fallback) |Inlines render loop | !! Core renderer `core/menu.tid`: generic renderer with `$eventcatcher` catching clicks on `.rrc-elem`, dispatching to `rrc0.elem-clicked`. !! Why vtabs inlines the render loop `$slot` inside `\procedure` doesn't find `$fill` from outer `$transclude $tiddler=`. vtabs puts `$slot` at body level with `<%if%>` type branching as a workaround. pills works because it transcludes `core/menu` (intermediate tiddler boundary). <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="warning"> <$fill $name="body">`$slot` inside `\procedure` does NOT find `$fill` from an outer `$transclude $tiddler=` — this is a TiddlyWiki limitation. Use body-level `$slot` with `<%if%>` branching as a workaround. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260305110450250","modified":"20260305110450250","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin files |!File |!Role | |`components/pills.tid` |Pills facade component | |`components/vtabs.tid` |Vertical tabs facade component | |`core/menu.tid` |Generic element renderer | |`core/mixins/bytype/*.tid` |Delegate mixins (view, click, visibility, class) | |`core/mixins/state-handling.tid` |State tiddler/field computation | |`core/mixins/utils.tid` |Sync utilities | |`core/styles/bytype/*.tid` |Type-specific CSS | |`showcase.tid` |Live demo | !! Restart rules |!Change |!Restart needed? | |Edit existing `.tid` |No — filesystem-watcher syncs | |Add/delete/rename `.tid` |Yes — directory scan at boot | !! Creating a new facade # Create `.tid` in `components/` directory # Set title under `$:/plugins/rimir/components/` # Add `\parameters` declaration with defaults # `\import` needed mixins from `core/mixins/` # Define `rrc0.elems`, `rrc0.elem-type` # Define `rrc1.*` handlers (state, click, view) # Add CSS (class-prefixed, not `@scope`) # Transclude `core/menu` or inline the render loop # Restart server !! Adding an element type to vtabs # Choose a type code (e.g., `sec`, `act`, `lnk`) # Add click handler: `rrc1.elem-clicked:` # Add view slot in body-level `<%if%>` chain # Add CSS for the type # Add to `visible-types` default parameter !! Known limitations * `@scope` CSS is Chrome-only — use class-prefixed CSS instead * `$slot` in procedures — see Architecture section * No click slots in vtabs (hardcoded behaviors) <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip"> <$fill $name="body">CSS uses class prefixes (`.rrc-pills`, `.rrc-vtabs`) instead of `@scope` for Firefox compatibility. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/examples","created":"20260305110450250","modified":"20260305110450250","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Pills — minimal multi-select ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Red Green Blue" selection="multi" /> ``` !! Pills — single-select ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Option-A Option-B Option-C" selection="single" /> ``` !! Pills — with filtering ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="[tag[Topic]]" selection="multi" filterable="yes" /> ``` !! Pills — custom view slot ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Alpha Beta Gamma" selection="multi"> <$fill $name="view"> <> ``` !! Pills — syncing to external tiddler ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Tag1 Tag2 Tag3" selection="multi" sync-tiddler="MyTiddler" sync-field="tags" /> ``` !! Vertical tabs — basic setup ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="[tag[Section]]" type-fn="[get[elem-type]]" visible-types="sec act lnk"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> Section: <> <$fill $name="view-act"> Action: <> ``` !! Raw mixin usage (advanced) ``` \import [[$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/...]] \procedure rrc0.elems() item1 item2 item3 \procedure rrc0.elem-type(element) selector \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:selector(element) ... <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/menu"/> ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body">Facade components handle all mixin wiring. Raw mixin usage is only needed for building entirely new component types. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/faq","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Q: When should I use a facade vs raw mixins? Use facades (`pills`, `vtabs`) for standard use cases — they handle all mixin wiring internally. Use raw mixins only when you need a completely new component type that doesn't fit either facade's rendering model. !! Q: Why doesn't $slot work inside my \procedure? This is a TiddlyWiki limitation. `$slot` inside `\procedure` cannot find `$fill` from an outer `$transclude $tiddler=` call. The workaround is to place `$slot` at body level (outside any procedure) with `<%if%>` branching. This is why vtabs inlines its render loop instead of using `core/menu.tid`. !! Q: How do I add a new element type? # Choose a type code (e.g., `mytype`) # Add a view delegate in `core/mixins/bytype/view-delegate.tid` (or define `rrc1.elem-view:mytype` in your component) # Add a click handler: `rrc1.elem-clicked:mytype` # Add CSS for the type (class-prefixed, e.g., `.rrc-pills .rrc-elem-mytype`) # If using vtabs, add an `<%if%>` branch and include the code in `visible-types` !! Q: Why no @scope CSS? `@scope` is Chrome-only as of early 2026. For cross-browser compatibility, the components use class-prefixed CSS (`.rrc-pills`, `.rrc-vtabs`) to scope styles. !! Q: How do I sync component state to an external tiddler? Use the `sync-tiddler` and `sync-field` parameters on pills. The component reads initial state from and writes selection changes to the specified tiddler field. For vtabs, the `state` parameter controls where the active tab state is stored. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/overview","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.hub-category":"ui-framework","rdt.hub-category-name":"UI Framework & Domain Model","rdt.hub-order":"3","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! What it does Reusable UI component framework with composable mixins. Provides facade components (pills, vtabs) that most users consume, and a raw mixin system for advanced customization. !! Features * ''Facade components'' — ready-to-use: `pills` (selectable tags), `vtabs` (collapsible vertical tabs) * ''Three-layer mixin system'' — `rrc0.*` (core/model), `rrc1.*` (behavior), consumer overrides * ''Slot-based customization'' — `$fill` slots for custom rendering and callbacks * ''State management'' — automatic state tiddler handling, sync to external tiddlers/fields * ''Type dispatch'' — element types control rendering, click behavior, and visibility !! Quick start Two modes: * ''Facades'' (recommended): transclude `pills` or `vtabs` with parameters + slots * ''Raw mixins'' (advanced): import mixins directly, define `rrc0.*`/`rrc1.*` functions Example pills usage: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Alpha Beta Gamma" selection="multi" /> ``` Example vtabs usage: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="[tag[Section]]" type-fn="[get[elem-type]]" /> ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body">Facades handle all mixin wiring internally. Most users never need to touch the `rrc0.*`/`rrc1.*` layer directly. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/reference","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Pills parameters |!Parameter |!Default |!Description | |`elements` |`""` |Space-separated list or TW filter | |`selection` |`"multi"` |`"multi"` or `"single"` | |`filterable` |`"no"` |`"no"`, `"yes"` (popup), or `"inline"` (search input above pills) | |`sync-tiddler` |`""` |External tiddler to sync state to | |`sync-field` |`"text"` |Field on sync-tiddler | |`state` |auto-generated |State tiddler for selection | |`instid` |auto-generated |Instance ID for CSS scoping | !! Pills slots |!Slot name |!Variables |!Description | |`view` |`element` |Custom element rendering | |`on-select` |`element`, `modifier` |Callback on selection change | !! Vtabs parameters |!Parameter |!Default |!Description | |`elements` |`""` |TW filter returning element titles | |`type-fn` |`""` |Filter to get element type code | |`state` |auto-generated |State tiddler for active tab | |`instid` |auto-generated |Instance ID | |`visible-types` |`"sec"` |Space-separated always-visible type codes | |`default-collapsed` |`"yes"` |Start with sections collapsed | |`lnk-navigate` |`"yes"` |Navigate on link-type click | !! Vtabs slots |!Slot name |!Variables |!Description | |`view-sec` |`element` |Render for type `sec` | |`view-act` |`element` |Render for type `act` | |`view-pop` |`element` |Render for type `pop` (popup) | |`view-lnk` |`element` |Render for type `lnk` (link) | |`view-sco` |`element` |Render for type `sco` (scope) | |`view-spa` |`element` |Render for type `spa` (spacer) | |`view` |`element` |Fallback render for unknown types | !! Mixin functions — Layer 0 (rrc0.*) |!Function |!Purpose | |`rrc0.elems()` |Returns element list (space-separated or filter) | |`rrc0.elem-type(element)` |Maps element to type code | |`rrc0.elem-visible(element)` |Visibility filter for element | |`rrc0.elem-view(element)` |Rendering dispatch | |`rrc0.elem-clicked(element)` |Click handler dispatch | |`rrc0.elem-add-class(element)` |CSS class dispatch | !! Mixin functions — Layer 1 (rrc1.*) |!Function |!Purpose | |`rrc1.elem-clicked:(element)` |Type-specific click handler | |`rrc1.elem-view:(element)` |Type-specific view | |`rrc1.state.tiddler(key, uid)` |Returns state tiddler title | |`rrc1.state.prefix()` |Returns state tiddler prefix | |`rrc1.state.field(key)` |Returns state field name | |`rrc1.elem-selected(tiddler, field, element, yes, no)` |Check if element is selected | |`rrc1.elem-add-class(element)` |Returns CSS class for selected state | !! CSS classes |!Class |!Description | |`.rrc-component` |Inner component container | |`.rrc-elem` |Individual element (click target) | |`.selected` |Added to selected elements | |`.rrc-type-` |Per-type styling hook (e.g., `.rrc-type-sec`) | |`.rrc-pills` |Pills container scope | |`.rrc-vtabs` |Vtabs container scope | |`.rrc-pills-inline-filter` |Inline filter input container | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! \import pragma Pulls functions/procedures from tiddlers into scope. Used for mixin composition (last-wins semantics). !! \parameters Declares tiddler-level parameters with defaults. Facades use this for their public API. !! $transclude modes * `$transclude $tiddler=""` — creates new transclusion boundary (slot/fill works) * `$transclude $variable=""` — does NOT create boundary (slot may not find fill) !! $slot / $fill * Insert content at predefined points in templates * ''Critical limitation'': no colons in `$name` (fails silently) — use hyphens * ''Critical limitation'': `$slot` in `\procedure` doesn't find `$fill` from `$transclude $tiddler=` * Workaround: body-level `$slot` with `<%if%>` branching * Why pills works: intermediate `core/menu` tiddler transclusion creates boundary !! $eventcatcher Catches click events matching CSS selectors. Sets `dom-data-*` variables from `data-*` attributes on clicked elements. !! <%if%> Conditional rendering widget. Used in vtabs for type-based branching at body level. !! code-body: yes Field that tells TW to treat tiddler body as `\function`/`\procedure`/`\parameters` definitions. !! is[variable] Filter operator that checks if a variable/function is defined in current scope. <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="danger"> <$fill $name="body">Never use colons in `$slot`/`$fill` `$name` attributes (e.g., `$name="view:sco"`). TW silently fails — no error, just falls back to default content. Use hyphens instead: `$name="view-sco"`. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/documentation","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %> <$tiddler tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/overview"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/overview"/> <%else%> To display this documentation, the plugin [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]] needs to be installed. See the [[readme|$:/plugins/rimir/components/readme]] tab for a basic overview. <%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/readme","created":"20260305110450253","modified":"20260305110450253","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! components Reusable UI component framework with composable mixins and facade components. Build complex interactive widgets by combining small, focused building blocks. !! Key features * ''Facade components'' — ready-to-use `pills` (with inline/popup filtering) and `vtabs` components * ''Mixin system'' — composable behaviours: state handling, single/multi select, delegation * ''Style-by-type'' — swappable visual styles (e.g., `simple-hoverable-pill`, `tabs-style`) * ''Menu component'' — configurable menu with delegate-based actions * ''Showcase'' — live interactive examples demonstrating all components !! Prerequisites No external prerequisites. !! Quick start Use facade components directly via transclusion. See the showcase tiddler (`$:/plugins/rimir/components/showcase`) for interactive examples of all available components and mixins. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/settings","created":"20260305110450253","modified":"20260305110450253","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"
No configurable settings. Future settings will appear here.
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/showcase":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/showcase","created":"20260226120000000","modified":"20260305110450253","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Components Facade Showcase This tiddler demonstrates the facade layer for the components plugin. Facades expose a simple parameter + slot API, hiding the internal mixin machinery. !! 1. Standalone Pills (minimal) Multi-select pills with default styling — just pass `elements` and go: <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="alpha beta gamma delta epsilon" selection="multi" state="$:/state/showcase/pills-basic"/> !! 2. Single-Select Pills Only one pill can be active at a time: <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="red green blue yellow" selection="single" state="$:/state/showcase/pills-single"/> !! 3. Pills with Filtering + Custom View + on-select Filter popup, custom rendering via `view` slot, and `on-select` action logging: <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="p-1 p-2 p-3 p-4 p-5 p-6 p-7 p-8" filterable="yes" selection="multi" state="$:/state/showcase/pills-filtered"> <$fill $name="view"> ''<$text text={{{[uppercase[]]}}}/>'' <$fill $name="on-select"> <$action-log message=`Pill selected: $(element)$ (modifier: $(modifier)$)`/> !! 4. Vertical Tabs with Nested Pills Demonstrates vtabs with sections, actions, links, and nested pill subcomponents. * ''sec'' (sections): click to expand/collapse child elements * ''act'' (actions): clicking stores the last-clicked action in state — shown below the component * ''lnk'' (links): clicking navigates to the element as a tiddler title * ''sco'' (subcomponents): nested pills with independent selection state — no `$unset` needed because `$fill` content runs in the caller's scope <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="section-1 act-11 act-12 lnk-11 scomp-11 scomp-12" type-fn="[prefix[section-]then[sec]]~[prefix[act-]then[act]]~[prefix[lnk-]then[lnk]]~[prefix[scomp-]then[sco]]" state="$:/state/showcase/vtabs"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> <$text text={{{[removeprefix[section-]addprefix[Section ]]}}}/> <$fill $name="view-act"> ▶ Action: <> <$fill $name="view-lnk"> 🔗 <> <$fill $name="view-sco"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements={{{[match[scomp-11]then[p-1 p-2 p-3 p-4]else[x-1 x-2 x-3 x-4]]}}} selection="multi" state=`$:/state/showcase/vtabs:$(element)$`/> Last action clicked: ''<$text text={{$:/state/showcase/vtabs:last-click}}/>'' "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/styles-pills":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/styles-pills","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".rrc-pills span.rrc-elem { display: inline; text-align: center; padding: 2px 5px 2px 5px; } .rrc-pills span.rrc-elem:hover { cursor: pointer; } .rrc-pills span[data-elem-type].selected { background-color: <>; color: <>; } .rrc-pills span[data-elem-type="selector"] { border-radius: 1em; font-weight: bold; background-color: <>; } .rrc-pills span:hover[data-elem-type="selector"] { background-color: <>; color: <>; } .rrc-pills-inline-filter { margin-bottom: 4px; } .rrc-pills-inline-filter input { width: 100%; font-size: 0.85em; padding: 3px 6px; } "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/styles-vtabs":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/styles-vtabs","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".rrc-vtabs span.rrc-elem { width: 400px; display: block; border-color: <>; border-bottom: 0px; text-align: center; padding: 3px; } .rrc-vtabs span.rrc-elem:hover { cursor: pointer; } .rrc-vtabs span[data-elem-type="spa"]:hover { cursor: auto; } .rrc-vtabs span[data-elem-type="sec"] { background: <>; border-top-left-radius: 1em; border: 1px dotted; font-weight: bold; } .rrc-vtabs span:hover[data-elem-type="sec"] { background-color: <>; color: <>; } .rrc-vtabs span[data-elem-type="act"] { background: <>; border: 1px dotted; font-weight: bold; } .rrc-vtabs span:hover[data-elem-type="act"] { background-color: <>; } .rrc-vtabs span[data-elem-type="pop"] { background: <>; border: 1px dotted; font-weight: bold; } .rrc-vtabs span:hover[data-elem-type="pop"] { background-color: <>; } .rrc-vtabs span[data-elem-type="lnk"] { background: <>; color: <>; border: 1px dotted; font-weight: bold; } .rrc-vtabs span:hover[data-elem-type="lnk"] { background-color: <>; } .rrc-vtabs span[data-elem-type="sco"] { background: <>; border: 1px dotted; font-weight: bold; } .rrc-vtabs span:hover[data-elem-type="sco"] { background-color: <>; } "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/test/test-pills":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/test/test-pills","description":"Test pills component renders wrapper div and style block","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki-multiple","tags":"[[$:/tags/wiki-test-spec]]","text":"title: Output \whitespace trim \procedure pills(elements:"", selection:"multi") \whitespace trim
\end <$transclude $variable="pills" elements=""/> + title: ExpectedResult

[subfilter] \function rrc0.elem-type(element) [subfilterelse[unknown]] \function internal.default-vis() [match[yes]then[no]else[yes]] \function rrc1.elem-visible(elem, elem-type) [enlistmatchthen[yes]]~[function[rrc1.state.tiddler],[section-vis],get]~[function[internal.default-vis]] \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:sec(element, modifier, relative-coords) <$let vis-tid={{{[function[rrc1.state.tiddler],[section-vis],]}}} vis-fld=<> stored={{{[get]}}} effective={{{[!is[blank]]~[function[internal.default-vis]]}}} new-val={{{[match[yes]then[no]else[yes]]}}}><$action-setfield $tiddler=<> $field=<> $value=<>/> \end \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:act(element, modifier, relative-coords) <$action-setfield $tiddler=`$(state)$:last-click` $value=<>/> \end \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:lnk(element, modifier, relative-coords) <%if [match[yes]]%><$action-navigate $to=<>/><%endif%> \end \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:pop(element, modifier, relative-coords) \end \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:sco(element, modifier, relative-coords) \end \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:spa(element, modifier, relative-coords) \end \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked(element, modifier, relative-coords) \end
<$eventcatcher selector=".rrc-elem" $click=<> tag="div">
<$list filter="[function[rrc0.elems]]" variable="element"> <$let deftype={{{[!is[blank]else[unknown]]}}} element-type={{{[[rrc0.elem-type]!is[variable]then]~[function[rrc0.elem-type],else]}}} > <%if [[rrc0.elem-visible]!is[variable]]~[function[rrc0.elem-visible],,match[yes]]%> ,addprefix[ ]]}$` data-elem-type=<> data-elem=<>><%if [match[sec]]%><$slot $name="view-sec" element=<>><$slot $name="view" element=<> element-type="sec"><><%elseif [match[act]]%><$slot $name="view-act" element=<>><$slot $name="view" element=<> element-type="act"><><%elseif [match[pop]]%><$slot $name="view-pop" element=<>><$slot $name="view" element=<> element-type="pop"><><%elseif [match[lnk]]%><$slot $name="view-lnk" element=<>><$slot $name="view" element=<> element-type="lnk"><><%elseif [match[sco]]%><$slot $name="view-sco" element=<>><$slot $name="view" element=<> element-type="sco"><><%elseif [match[spa]]%><$slot $name="view-spa" element=<>><$slot $name="view" element=<> element-type="spa"><><%else%><><%endif%> <%endif%>
